caption: A presentation slide is displayed, featuring the question "What do you want to accomplish?" written in black text on a white background. Below the question are three horizontally stacked colored rectangles. The top rectangle is yellow and contains the text "Determining needs" next to a magnifying glass icon. The middle rectangle is also yellow and contains the text "Setting priorities" next to a checklist icon showing "NOW" and "LATER". The bottom rectangle is grey and contains the text "Create benchmarks" next to a benchmark icon. In the upper corners of the screen, small video feeds show a woman with dark hair wearing a dark-colored top. A yellow banner runs across the bottom of the screen, displaying the logo "MHP" in a few locations. The visuals remain static across the sequence, with no changes to the text, icons, or the appearance of the individuals in the video feeds.
